utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details and costs: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plan components and a combined cost (€165/month). Meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance, includes details (covers €8,000 photography equipment) and a cost (€95/month). Meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with plan name, detailed coverage description, and cost (€115/month). Meets requirement. 4) additional_services: includes an enhancement service with details and cost (€20/month). Meets requirement. 5) total_budget: provides complete monthly/annual breakdown including before discount, discount, after discount plus membership fee, and annual cost. Meets requirement. Therefore, 5/5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each selected item in the final coverage plan to its exact counterpart in the ground-truth ratings and return the numeric rating. The final plan includes: health physical = InsurePlus Standard Plan (€105/month) which matches primary_health_coverage.physical_health.InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10). Health mental = InsurePlus Standard Plan (€60/month) which matches primary_health_coverage.mental_health.InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 7). Property home/contents = EliteHome Premium Coverage, which matches property_protection.home_content.EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 2). Travel plan = PrimeTravel Premium Plan, which matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 3). Additional services = Premium Insurance Membership (€20/month), which matches general_services.Premium Insurance Membership (rating 6).
